task_completion.description: The agent opened and read the energy policy memo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/energy_policy_memo.txt'.

task_completion.description: The agent logged into the OpenMaint application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the OpenMaint dashboard or UI, indicating successful login with the admin account.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the thermostat asset records within OpenMaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint UI displaying a list, table, or search interface specifically for thermostat assets.

task_completion.description: The agent updated the Notes field of Smart thermostats in the Headquarters building.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint UI showing a thermostat record identified as 'Smart' and located in 'Headquarters' being edited, with 'Profile: Eco-2026' entered into the Notes field.

task_completion.description: The agent updated the Notes field of Manual or legacy digital thermostats in the Headquarters building.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint UI showing a thermostat record identified as 'Manual' (or legacy digital) and located in 'Headquarters' being edited, with 'Action: Replace' entered into the Notes field.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to update the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser windows showing the OpenMaint UI with form fields being filled and saved, rather than terminal commands executing database updates, curl commands, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify assets outside the Headquarters building (e.g., Warehouse).
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots show the agent editing or saving records for thermostats located in the 'Warehouse' building or any location other than 'Headquarters'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenMaint application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/' and the interface matches a genuine web application, not a mocked local HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target building: Headquarters. Contamination building: Warehouse. Smart thermostats must be updated with 'Profile: Eco-2026' in their Notes field. Manual/Legacy thermostats must be updated with 'Action: Replace' in their Notes field. These strings should be checked case-insensitively. Modifications to Warehouse assets are out-of-scope and incorrect.
